module.dummy.title: Maze
module.maze.title: Maze
module.maze.ui.tips_this_feature_only_su:
### Tips
* This feature only supports the new Buff Maze, not the old maze
* Single Run is suitable for first 3 stages; Repeat Run keeps farming the last stage
* Select buffs in team setup first, then click Start Maze in Acacia
* Recommended buffs: Skill-Chain Lightning and Shield-Steal
* Team must include Chenxing - Qiongxian in the middle slot
* Bring a strong support unit to reduce sudden deaths
